product_overview: An AI-driven personal content automation platform that generates weekly, platform-specific posts in each founder’s unique voice, minimizing setup and decision fatigue while preserving privacy and per-person content isolation.
core_goals: Automate a weekly, platform-specific content calendar for each user/profile.
Preserve and amplify each founder’s unique voice with isolated Founder Profiles.
Deliver a minimal, calm UI that reduces cognitive load and avoids analytics noise.
Support scalable profile management and subscription tiers with Stripe billing.
Continuously optimize content via a hidden AI feedback loop without exposing analytics.
Ensure strict data isolation per profile and provide privacy/compliance controls.

features.name: Onboarding Flow
features.description: Frictionless multi-step onboarding to select platforms, submit writing samples, choose a subscription plan and train a per-profile voice model (see Onboarding & Voice Learning, pages 1–3).
user_flows: Navigate to /onboarding -> Select platforms checkboxes (e.g., X, LinkedIn, Instagram) -> Paste writing samples into sample fields -> Click Next/Continue -> Review optional sample-generated preview labeled "Sample content in your voice" -> Click Yes to accept sample -> Choose subscription plan by clicking "Choose [Plan]" -> Complete Stripe checkout (POST /api/stripe/checkout) -> See onboarding confirmation message "All set!" -> Redirect to /dashboard and see "Content is being prepared"

Navigate to /onboarding -> Select platforms -> Paste minimal or no writing samples -> Click Next/Continue -> See inline warning "More text gives better results" -> Click Continue anyway -> System shows "Training your voice model..." -> See placeholder on /dashboard "Content is being prepared" (happy fallback for minimal input)

Navigate to /onboarding -> Fill required fields and click "Choose [Plan]" -> Stripe checkout fails or is cancelled -> See payment error message "Payment failed, please try again" -> Remain on StepPayment and allow user to retry or choose another plan

Navigate to /onboarding -> Paste samples and click Next -> System shows generated sample post preview -> Click No/Discard on preview -> Edit pasted samples -> Click Next -> See updated preview and accept to continue

features.name: Weekly Content Calendar Generation
features.description: Automated weekly generation of platform-specific content for each profile (short-form X posts, longer LinkedIn posts, Instagram video scripts). Generation runs via scheduled jobs and writes into the profile's ContentCalendar (see Weekly Content Calendar Generation, page 3).
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> See Week View with days and platform-specific post cards for the upcoming week -> Click a post card to open Post Detail -> Read full generated content, hooks, and CTA -> Click "Copy to clipboard" -> See copy confirmation and paste externally to post
Scheduled generation runs (cron) -> Server invokes AI generation and writes to ContentCalendar -> New posts appear on /dashboard by Sunday/Monday -> Receive weekly digest email linking to /dashboard

Scheduled generation runs -> AI/provider error or rate limit occurs -> System logs error and retries -> On failure show app message on /dashboard "We’re sorry, we’re having trouble preparing this week’s posts. We’ll try again soon." -> Allow user to retry generation from Settings if available
Navigate to /dashboard -> There are no enabled platforms or onboarding incomplete -> See empty-state prompt on /dashboard "Finalize setup to see your weekly plan" -> Click prompt to go to /onboarding

features.name: Post Review / Post Detail Experience
features.description: Lightweight read-first post detail UI for copying text, viewing alternative hooks, and obtaining Instagram video script structure (see Posting Review Experience, page 4).
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> Click a post card for a specific day/platform -> See Post Detail card with main text, highlighted opening line, 2–3 hook alternatives, and light CTA -> Click alternate hook to swap -> Click "Copy to clipboard" -> See copy success toast
Navigate to /dashboard -> Click a LinkedIn post card -> See formatted paragraphs and optional CTA -> Click "Copy to clipboard" -> Paste into LinkedIn composer
Navigate to /dashboard -> Click an Instagram script card -> See structured script with "Opening" and bullet points -> Click "Copy to clipboard" or "Copy script" -> Copy succeeds
Open Post Detail -> Attempt to copy but network or clipboard permission denied -> See unobtrusive error "Unable to copy to clipboard" and a fallback suggestion to manually select text

features.name: Ideas Inbox (Spontaneous Ideas)
features.description: A non-destructive Ideas page to capture quick thoughts (text or voice), then optionally generate platform-specific posts from that idea without altering weekly calendars (see Ideas Inbox, pages 4–5 and page 8).
user_flows: Navigate to /ideas -> Click New Idea -> Enter text into idea field -> Click Save -> Idea appears in list with timestamp -> Click "Generate for LinkedIn" -> System calls idea-generation API (e.g., POST /api/generation/single) -> Generated LinkedIn post appears as a separate card under the idea -> Click "Copy" to reuse
Navigate to /ideas -> Record or upload voice memo -> System transcribes memo -> Transcription appears in idea card -> Click "Generate for X" -> Generated X post appears
Navigate to /ideas -> Click Generate on an idea -> AI generation fails -> See quiet inline error "Something went wrong, please try again" and a Retry button -> Click Retry to re-trigger generation

Navigate to /ideas -> Submit an idea very similar to an upcoming scheduled post -> System may show warning "This idea resembles content in your upcoming plan" -> User chooses to continue generating or cancel (non-destructive behavior)

features.name: Founder Profiles (Switching & Management)
features.description: Per-account Founder Profiles isolate voice models, calendars, ideas and feedback loops; profile creation and switching live in the settings/profile area and respect plan limits (see Founder Profiles, pages 6–7).
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> Open profile selector in header -> Select Profile B -> App reloads context -> Week View updates to show Profile B's calendar and voice-specific content

Navigate to /dashboard/settings -> Open Profiles management area -> Click "Add Profile" -> Enter profile name and paste samples -> Click Create -> If account plan allows, new profile is created and appears in selector
Navigate to /dashboard/settings -> Click "Add Profile" while at plan profile limit -> See message "Upgrade to add more profiles" and an action linking to Billing tab
Navigate to /dashboard -> Switch profiles while viewing an unsaved draft or transient UI state -> System clears transient state and loads selected profile's stable state to avoid data leakage

features.name: Settings & Billing
features.description: Account settings area for profile management, platform preferences, email digest settings and subscription management via Stripe (route: /dashboard/settings; see Billing & Management and Email Preferences, pages 7–11).
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/settings -> Switch to Billing tab -> View Current Plan details including profile allowance and next billing date -> Click "Upgrade" or "Manage Subscription" -> Initiate Stripe checkout (POST /api/stripe/checkout) -> Complete payment -> See updated plan and refreshed profile allowance in UI

Navigate to /dashboard/settings -> Switch to Billing tab -> Click "Downgrade" while account has more profiles than target tier allows -> See blocking message "Remove extra profiles to continue" with guidance to delete profiles or upgrade
Navigate to /dashboard/settings -> Change email digest preferences -> Toggle weekly digest off -> Save settings -> Receive confirmation that email digests are disabled
Navigate to /dashboard/settings -> Attempt to change payment method -> Stripe returns a payment failure on update -> See polite error explaining failed payment and steps to retry

routes.description: User onboarding flow to collect profile data and select subscription plan
User settings page including profile management and billing/subscription details

features.name: Onboarding Flow
features.description: Multi-step process to set up user profile and select subscription
user_interactions: Navigate through onboarding steps (Basics, Industry, Context, etc.)

features.name: Settings & Billing
features.description: View and manage user settings and subscription plan
